title: a wild milestone to wake up to! Agents SDK just smashed past 500k downloads ❤️ there’s really no better feeling than watching something the team has poured so much into take off like this huge thanks to everyone building with it, stress-testing it, and pushing it in directions we didn’t expect let's build more agents!
